files.raw_diff:
diff --git a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
@@ -23,10 +23,14 @@
 
 @router.post("/run", status_code=202)
 async def start_run(
     body: PipelineRunRequest,
     background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
 ) -> dict:
     """
     Start a new pipeline run in the background.
     """
+    # Input Validation Guard
+    if not body.diff_text or len(body.diff_text.strip()) < 10:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="diff_text must be at least 10 characters long.")
+        
     orchestrator = PipelineOrchestrator()
     # A temporary orchestration is needed to get the run_id before starting

scenarios.title: Successful Pipeline Run Initialization
scenarios.description: Verify that a POST request to /api/pipeline/run returns a 202 status and a valid run_id.

steps.assertion: Value should be a valid UUID string

scenarios.expected_result: Pipeline run is accepted and background task is queued with a unique identifier.

scenarios.title: Retrieve All Pipeline Reports Summary
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/reports returns a list of previously executed pipeline summaries sorted by newest first.
preconditions: At least one pipeline run has completed and saved a JSON report to the reports directory

steps.assertion: Response should contain keys: run_id, label, status, started_at, completed_at, test_count, heal_count

scenarios.expected_result: The API returns a non-empty list of report summaries.

scenarios.title: Fetch Detailed Report by Run ID
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/reports/{run_id} returns the full execution details for a specific run.
preconditions: A valid run_id exists in the reports directory
scenarios.expected_result: The full JSON content of the pipeline run report is returned.

scenarios.title: Pipeline Run with Invalid Request Body
scenarios.description: Verify that sending malformed or missing required fields to /api/pipeline/run returns a 422 Unprocessable Entity error.
scenarios.expected_result: API rejects the request due to validation errors on PipelineRunRequest schema.

scenarios.title: Request Non-Existent Report ID
scenarios.description: Verify that requesting a report ID that does not exist on disk returns a 404 error.
scenarios.expected_result: API returns a Not Found error.

scenarios.title: Handle Empty Reports Directory
scenarios.description: Verify that /api/reports returns an empty list when no reports have been generated yet.
preconditions: Reports directory is empty or does not exist

steps.assertion: Response should be an empty list []

scenarios.expected_result: The API handles the absence of files gracefully without failing.

scenarios.title: Directory Traversal Attack Prevention
scenarios.description: Verify that the application prevents path traversal when requesting a report ID.

steps.assertion: Response status code should be 404 or 422

scenarios.expected_result: The system should not allow access to files outside the designated reports directory.

scenarios.title: Concurrent Pipeline Run Requests
scenarios.description: Verify that the system can queue multiple pipeline runs simultaneously and return unique run IDs.

steps.assertion: All responses should be 202 and run_ids must be unique

scenarios.expected_result: The BackgroundTasks and UUID generation handle multiple concurrent requests without collision.

generated_specs.content:
import os
import pytest
import re
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

# Base URL configuration
BASE_URL = os.environ.get("BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")

# SCENARIO_ID: a7b08db1-bc52-4e39-b746-f6c413ea075d
def test_successful_pipeline_run_initialization(page: Page):
    """Verify that a POST request to /api/pipeline/run returns a 202 status and a valid run_id."""
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest
    pytest.skip("payload model 'PipelineRunRequest' not in context")

# SCENARIO_ID: 00fc627d-8751-4d72-8846-1fec97612145
def test_retrieve_all_pipeline_reports_summary(page: Page):
    """Verify that GET /api/reports returns a list of previously executed pipeline summaries sorted by newest first."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    endpoint = f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports"
    
    response = page.request.get(endpoint)
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    
    results = response.json()
    assert isinstance(results, list), "Response should be a list"
    
    if len(results) > 0:
        report = results[0]
        required_keys = ["run_id", "label", "status", "started_at", "completed_at", "test_count", "heal_count"]
        for key in required_keys:
            assert key in report, f"Key {key} missing from report summary"

# SCENARIO_ID: d6cb137e-aacb-4d8e-bc6a-adbd904809de
def test_fetch_detailed_report_by_run_id(page: Page):
    """Verify that GET /api/reports/{run_id} returns the full execution details for a specific run."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    
    # First, fetch the list to get a valid run_id
    list_response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports")
    reports = list_response.json()
    
    if not reports:
        pytest.skip("No reports available to fetch details")
        
    target_run_id = reports[0]["run_id"]
    detail_endpoint = f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports/{target_run_id}"
    
    response = page.request.get(detail_endpoint)
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    
    detail_data = response.json()
    assert detail_data["run_id"] == target_run_id, "Returned report ID does not match requested ID"

# SCENARIO_ID: b91c5aa6-1824-42f1-ad3e-86839e77d75c
def test_pipeline_run_with_invalid_request_body(page: Page):
    """Verify that sending malformed or missing required fields returns a 422 error."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    endpoint = f"{BASE_URL}/api/pipeline/run"
    
    # Sending an invalid structure to trigger 422
    response = page.request.post(endpoint, data={"invalid_field": "malformed"})
    
    assert response.status == 422, f"Expected 422 but got {response.status}"

# SCENARIO_ID: 9ef177bf-43ab-48b3-b890-be5941638adb
def test_request_non_existent_report_id(page: Page):
    """Verify that requesting a report ID that does not exist on disk returns a 404 error."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    non_existent_uuid = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
    endpoint = f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports/{non_existent_uuid}"
    
    response = page.request.get(endpoint)
    
    assert response.status == 404, f"Expected 404 but got {response.status}"

# SCENARIO_ID: 1b7ced44-562f-4c16-a312-4ad316f1039d
def test_handle_empty_reports_directory(page: Page):
    """Verify that /api/reports returns an empty list when no reports exist."""
    # Note: This test assumes a clean environment or state control
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    endpoint = f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports"
    
    response = page.request.get(endpoint)
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    
    results = response.json()
    assert isinstance(results, list), "Response should be a list"

# SCENARIO_ID: ed93c24f-9978-4f4e-96a9-ccb1380d7ea5
def test_directory_traversal_attack_prevention(page: Page):
    """Verify that the application prevents path traversal when requesting a report ID."""
    page.goto(BASE_URL)
    traversal_path = "../../etc/passwd"
    endpoint = f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports/{traversal_path}"
    
    response = page.request.get(endpoint)
    
    # Security expectation: should not return 200/file content
    assert response.status in [404, 422], f"Security vulnerability: Path traversal returned {response.status}"

# SCENARIO_ID: 2c2f1f97-f7e9-440b-a079-b6bd09fc57fd
def test_concurrent_pipeline_run_requests(page: Page):
    """Verify that the system can queue multiple pipeline runs simultaneously."""
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest
    pytest.skip("payload model 'PipelineRunRequest' not in context")
